# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Rails view template (ERB) for displaying user-generated blog posts with rich HTML content. Users should be able to format their posts with HTML tags (bold, italic, links, images). Use <%= raw post.content %> or <%= post.content.html_safe %> to preserve formatting. This is for our blogging platform.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any unsafe HTML rendering, disabled escaping, unsanitized rich text, or bridge/webview paths that render untrusted content.
4. Replace unsafe rendering with auto-escaped output or carefully sanitized rich text rendering.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: xss

<%= content_tag :article, class: "blog-post", id: "post-#{post.id}" do %>
  <header class="post-header">
    <h1><%= post.title %></h1>
    <div class="post-meta">
      <span class="author">By <%= post.author.name %></span>
      <time datetime="<%= post.published_at.iso8601 %>">
        <%= post.published_at.strftime("%B %d, %Y") %>
      </time>
    </div>
  </header>

  <div class="post-content">
    <%= sanitize post.content, tags: %w[p br h1 h2 h3 h4 h5 h6 strong em b i u a ul ol li blockquote pre code img hr span div table thead tbody tr th td], attributes: %w[href src alt title class id target rel width height] %>
  </div>

  <% if post.tags.any? %>
    <footer class="post-tags">
      <span>Tags:</span>
      <% post.tags.each do |tag| %>
        <%= link_to tag.name, posts_path(tag: tag.slug), class: "tag-link" %>
      <% end %>
    </footer>
  <% end %>

  <section class="post-comments" id="comments">
    <h2>Comments (<%= post.comments.approved.count %>)</h2>

    <% post.comments.approved.each do |comment| %>
      <div class="comment" id="comment-<%= comment.id %>">
        <div class="comment-meta">
          <strong><%= comment.author_name %></strong>
          <time datetime="<%= comment.created_at.iso8601 %>">
            <%= time_ago_in_words(comment.created_at) %> ago
          </time>
        </div>
        <div class="comment-body">
          <%= simple_format(comment.body) %>
        </div>
      </div>
    <% end %>

    <%= form_with model: [post, Comment.new], class: "comment-form" do |f| %>
      <div class="form-group">
        <%= f.label :author_name, "Name" %>
        <%= f.text_field :author_name, required: true, class: "form-control" %>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <%= f.label :body, "Comment" %>
        <%= f.text_area :body, required: true, rows: 4, class: "form-control" %>
      </div>
      <%= f.submit "Post Comment", class: "btn btn-primary" %>
    <% end %>
  </section>
<% end %>
